content.text:
Here is a summary of the trading events for the past 2 hours:

Signals:
- Received buy signal on AAPL at 15:45, entered long position
- Received sell signal on AMZN at 16:00, closed short position

Positions: 
- Long AAPL, entered at 15:45 at $125.30
- No open short positions

Market:
- S&P 500 up 1.2% on the day, hitting new all-time highs
- VIX index down to 15.3, indicating low market volatility

Overall, the trading signals and positions have performed well over the last 2 hours as the market continues its bullish trend. Let me know if you need any clarification or have additional requests!
